# daytona_health (Data Source)

Reads Daytona service liveness and readiness status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_health" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `details_json` (String) Readiness detail checks as a JSON object string.
- `error_json` (String) Readiness error checks as a JSON object string.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `info_json` (String) Readiness info checks as a JSON object string.
- `live` (Boolean) Whether the Daytona liveness endpoint returned a successful HTTP status.
- `live_http_status` (Number) HTTP status code returned by the liveness endpoint.
- `ready` (Boolean) Whether the Daytona readiness endpoint returned a successful HTTP status.
- `ready_http_status` (Number) HTTP status code returned by the readiness endpoint.
- `response_json` (String) Full readiness response as a JSON object string.
- `status` (String) Readiness status reported by Daytona, when available.
